description.content: Manage simulation request-response pairs and metadata.
Manage post-serve actions executed after responses are served.
Inspect and clear the cache of matched request-response pairs.
Inspect and filter the journal of intercepted requests.
Manage stateful keys used during simulation.
Inspect and clear response difference reports.

Hoverfly's Admin API provides programmatic control of a Hoverfly instance, including simulation management, mode and middleware configuration, journal and diff inspection, state management, caching, logging, templating data sources, and post-serve actions.

Contact Support:
 Name: Hoverfly Project
